hooks.command: d=$(cat); echo "$d" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty' | grep -qiE 'git([[:space:]]+-[^[:space:]]+)*[[:space:]]+push([[:space:]]|$)' && printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"git push esta prohibido en este repositorio por .claude/settings.json"}}' || printf '{}'
hooks.statusMessage: Verificando que no sea git push...
